overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in Western attire walking along a misty mountain trail. The character traverses rocky terrain and reaches a scenic overlook with panoramic views of a fog-filled valley and distant river.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail with rocky cliffs to the left

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall running alongside the path
tall evergreen trees scattered along the right side of the trail
narrow winding dirt path through grass and rocks
fog-filled valley visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the left, with pine trees and grassy slopes on the right. The path winds through moderate vegetation with glimpses of a misty valley in the far distance.

events.description: large rock formation comes into view ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking past the massive rock formation on the left

entered.detail: massive boulder blocking the path ahead with dark cave-like indentation

segments.scene_description: The trail leads toward a massive rock outcropping that dominates the path ahead. As the character passes the formation on the left, the pine trees shift from the right to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with valley view

events.description: emerging from behind rock formation to open overlook with panoramic valley view
flock of birds flies overhead against the gray sky

agents.ego_description: walking across rocky terrain at the cliff edge with expansive valley views

entered.detail: exposed gray rock surface replacing the dirt path
wide mist-filled valley with layered mountain ridges
silver river visible through the mist in the valley below
small flock of birds circling in the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from behind the rock formation, the scene opens to a wide rocky overlook with full sky visibility. The ground transitions from dirt to gravel and rock, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the mist-filled valley with a distant river and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed cliff edge overlooking misty valley

events.description: character slows to a stop at the cliff edge to observe the view

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the cliff edge to look out over the misty valley

segments.scene_description: The character slows to a stop at the exposed cliff edge, standing on rocky terrain to take in the expansive view of the misty valley. The birds drift toward the right side of the frame as the character observes the layered mountain ridges and fog-filled landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that gradually opens into a vast, panoramic overlook. It begins with the character walking a dirt path hugged by a rocky cliff and pine trees, with only glimpses of a misty valley visible in the distance. As the character advances, the trail leads around a massive rock outcropping that dominates the view before the vegetation shifts and the path clears. The scene then expands from the confined trail onto a wide gravel plateau, revealing a breathtaking vista of a fog-filled valley and a distant river. Finally, the camera slows to a stop at the exposed cliff edge, where the character stands amidst rocky terrain to observe layered mountain ridges as birds drift across the open sky.
